title: Realistic Berry Cluster
description: Replaces the Sweet Berry item texture with a high-definition, photorealistic cluster of berries.
body:
🍓 Realistic Berry Cluster (Sweet Berry Item Texture) - 1024x Resolution
A Cosmetic Resource Pack for the Z.XP.XP.900 Collection.
This resource pack replaces the default low-resolution Sweet Berry item texture with a detailed, high-resolution 1024x1024 texture, matching the realistic appearance shown in the images. This upgrade is purely aesthetic.
✨ Aesthetic Focus & Project Details
 * Replacement Target: Sweet Berry item texture only (file name: sweet_berries.png).
 * Resolution: 1024x1024.
 * Resource Pack Type: Purely Cosmetic/Aesthetic.
 * Compatibility: Tested on Minecraft 1.21.10. Should work on most versions that include the Sweet Berry item.
⚠️ Known Issues & Future Fixes
 * Visual Glitches (Empty Pixels): You may notice some empty pixels or spacing issues with the texture. This issue is often related to how Minecraft's engine renders item models, particularly with newer items like the Fishing Rod or Trident.
   * Potential Fix: We recommend trying the Model Gap Fix mod if you encounter this spacing issue: https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix
   * Future Update: We are working to crush these visual glitches in the next resource pack update to ensure the best possible rendering and handling. Expect a flawless look in a future version!
 * Item Held in Hand: The item placement in the player's hand might feel slightly off. This will also be adjusted and improved in the next update.
Support, Custom Requests, & Communication
If you encounter any issues not listed above, please report them immediately so we can fix them!
We also offer FREE custom resource pack requests. If you would like a similar high-resolution, realistic texture for another item, or if you need a specific cosmetic pack made, please reach out!
Our Contact Channels

 * Official Telegram Channel: https://t.me/k269he
 * Discord Invite Link: https://discord.gg/RbA8A4JCPM
